channel.title: Legislative Branch Contract Opportunities
channel.description: New contract opportunities from the U.S. House, Senate, and legislative branch support agencies, sourced from SAM.gov.

item.title: [Library of Congress] Fabrication and A/V Integration Services for LOCal Experience at Cleveland Public Library
